name: Passphrase & Password Generator
shortDescription: Random passwords or multi-word passphrases using Web Crypto—copy with one tap.

name: QR Code Generator
shortDescription: Turn text or URLs into a QR code and download a PNG.

name: Reflex Challenge
shortDescription: Wait for green, then click—see your reaction time in milliseconds.

name: Mini Snake
shortDescription: Classic grid snake with keyboard, WASD, and on-screen arrows.

name: WCAG Contrast Checker
shortDescription: Check text and background colors for WCAG 2.1 contrast and AA / AAA pass levels.

name: JSON Format & Validate
shortDescription: Pretty-print, minify, and validate JSON locally—errors include line and column.

name: Random Palette Explorer
shortDescription: Explore color palettes by clicking the vibe you like until one set remains.

name: Meeting Cost Timer
shortDescription: Enter $/hour and people; watch the cost rise live as time progresses.

name: Quick Image Converter
shortDescription: Drag-and-drop an image and convert it instantly to another format.

name: Weird Generative Canvas
shortDescription: A random algorithm with a random color scheme that animates on your screen.

name: Mesh gradient studio
shortDescription: Hero-style mesh gradients: presets, four blob colors, shape/bias sliders, grain, motion, and copy-ready CSS.

name: Word & Character Counter
shortDescription: Live counts for words, characters, lines, sentences, paragraphs, and rough read time.

name: Percentage Calculator
shortDescription: What is X% of Y, or X is what percent of Y—solved locally in two panels.

name: Coin Flip
shortDescription: Fair virtual coin with crypto randomness, heads/tails tallies, and a streak counter.

name: Typing Speed Sprint
shortDescription: Thirty-second word sprint in the browser—see your WPM when time is up.

name: Memory Match
shortDescription: Flip cards on a 4×4 grid and find eight emoji pairs—track your move count.

name: Tic-Tac-Toe vs Computer
shortDescription: You’re X versus an O that plays perfectly with minimax—draws are a solid outcome.

name: Void Oracle
shortDescription: Consult a purple orb for surreal prophecies—nonsense wisdom, cosmic vibes, zero stakes.

name: Blob Choir
shortDescription: Eight wobbly blobs; each tap triggers detuned Web Audio bleeps and hums.

name: Dice roller
shortDescription: Roll d4–d20 with crypto randomness, a poppy result, and a short roll history.

name: Emoji slots
shortDescription: Spin three emoji reels—jackpot on three of a kind, bragging rights included.

name: Compliment cannon
shortDescription: Fire a random absurd compliment; F or Space for rapid deployment.

name: Magic 8 ball
shortDescription: Tap the purple ball for a shake and a cryptic answer—browser RNG, not destiny.

name: Rock paper scissors
shortDescription: Play RPS vs crypto-random throws with a running win / loss / tie tally.

name: Late excuse generator
shortDescription: Spin up a plausible-ish excuse—blame entropy, not your calendar.

name: Button mash sprint
shortDescription: Five seconds on the clock—how many mashes? A tiny thumb workout.

name: Pixel doodle
shortDescription: 12×12 toggle pixels—doodle glyphs, noise, or alien flags; clear or randomize.

name: Star click sky
shortDescription: Click the night sky to drop twinkling stars—clear for a fresh universe.

name: Banana meter
shortDescription: Slide from ‘not banana’ to ‘maximum banana’—purely scientific (no).

name: Odd emoji out
shortDescription: Four emoji, three match—tap the impostor; score streaks on success.

name: Breathing pacer
shortDescription: Follow a gentle circle—4s in, 4s out. Visual guide only, not medical advice.

name: Three doors
shortDescription: Pick a door: one star, two goats (friendly). Play again with a new hiding spot.
